attempt: Transfer only the requirement that one local compensation event cannot be assumed to repair an unbounded global deficit. No Mersenne or Collatz formula is transferred.

bounded_result.candidate_theorem: Prove cumulative exact-gap mass survives every parity leakage stage, not one selector correction.
